name: Watch Party
description: Propose links, vote on what to watch next, and enjoy content together in sync. Includes role-based permissions, a moderator approval queue, deduplication, and synchronized playback.
author: Eluthio

changelog.1.1.0: Role-based permissions (propose/moderate/control); moderator approval queue; URL deduplication (votes existing instead of duplicate); synchronized watch party playback with Initialising → Synchronising → Playback flow; admin management panel
changelog.1.0.6: Fix network error on propose; add Accept header to all requests
changelog.1.0.4: Added schema.sql for watch party tables; teardown.sql for clean uninstall
